mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, user_name, user_phone, user_address, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_type, pay_status, order_status, trade_no, remark, create_time, pay_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, user_name, user_phone, user_address, total_amount, pay_amount, pay_status, order_status, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{userAddress}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{payStatus}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = #{orderStatus} WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
